vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về thực vật
vocab.example: My botanical curiosity was piqued at a young age when my grandfather showed me how to graft fruit trees.
I remember being absolutely fascinated by the germination process of a simple bean seed in a glass jar.
In our small backyard, I used to cultivate a variety of aromatic herbs like mint and basil.

vocab.meaning: loài cây có sức sống tốt/chịu hạn tốt
vocab.example: Since I was quite forgetful as a child, my mother suggested I grow a hardy species like a cactus.
Trying to grow roses was a steep learning curve that significantly improved my horticultural skills.

vocab.meaning: phát triển mạnh mẽ, tốt tươi
vocab.example: I was incredibly proud to see my sunflowers thrive and eventually tower over the garden fence.

vocab.meaning: xanh tươi, phủ đầy cây cối
vocab.example: I spent my summer holidays transforming a corner of our balcony into a verdant little oasis.

vocab.meaning: sự chăm sóc tận tình và âu yếm
vocab.example: Those orchids required a lot of tender loving care, including precise watering and just the right amount of sunlight.
We planted several perennials that would bloom year after year, marking the passage of my childhood.

vocab.meaning: mang lại một vụ mùa/thu hoạch
vocab.example: There was nothing more rewarding than seeing our tomato plants finally yield a harvest of bright red fruits.
